compressed_prompt: convert sentence to email format, include 10 [placeholders] e.g., [name]
response:
Of course. Here is a sentence converted to a generic email format with 10 placeholders.

**Original Sentence:** "Please send the documents to the manager by Friday."

**Email Format with Placeholders:**

**Subject:** [Urgent/Follow-up] Regarding the [Project Name] Documents for [Client Name]

**Body:**

Dear [Recipient's Name],

I hope this email finds you well.

This is a reminder to please send the [Document Type] documents to [Manager's Name/Title] by [Due Date: Friday].

These are required for the upcoming [Meeting Name/Event] on [Event Date]. Please ensure they are signed by [Signatory Name] and copied to [CC Recipient's Name].

If you have any questions, feel free to reach out to me or [Point of Contact Name] at [Point of Contact Email].

Best regards,

[Your Name]
[Your Title]
[Your Company]
[Your Phone Number]
